/usr/bin/c++ -Os -g -DNDEBUG "CMakeFiles/perf-io.dir/perf/perf-io.cc.o" -o /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/utils/perf/ns3.45-perf-io-default   -L/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib -Wl,--no-as-needed /home/dhruba/ns-allinone-3.45/ns-3.45/build/lib/libns3.45-core-default.so -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--no-as-needed
